summary: High‑quality soundboard recording of a strong show highlighted by powerful Eyes, a stellar The Other One and an epic Sugar Magnolia.
review: The performance is praised for Jerry’s beautiful vocal phrasing, a ripping "Eyes of the World" and one of the best renditions of "The Other One" on the archive.  The show closes with an unforgettable Sugar Magnolia and a solid Casey Jones, while the recording is generally clean though occasional high‑note distortion is noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is described as excellent with several standout songs; recording is good but has minor distortion issues, yielding an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and well‑balanced soundboard source; a few reviewers note occasional high‑note guitar distortion/clipping.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist is considered solid though not spectacular; strong closing with Sugar Magnolia and Casey Jones gives the show a memorable arc.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for beautiful vocal enunciation and note‑holding; occasional distortion when hitting high notes noted.
